calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Parties are sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

Appearances: Barbara Elaine Greene (Petitioner). Hannah Devereaux (Respondent).

The Court heard testimonies from both parties. At the conclusion of argument, the Court DENIED the Request for Restraining Order. The initial incident did not rise to Elder Abuse according to the statute and there are not any fact that support the request.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Linda Forster CSR #13286. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Off Calendar

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Continued To Apr-11-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara E. Greene (Petitioner).

The Petition has not been served on Ms. Devereaux and the matter cannot go forward. The Request for Restraing Order was continued to April 11, 2012 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J Busch. Court Reporter: Tamra Keen CSR #5404. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
